title: Velvety Korean Chicken Stew
description: Fresh, velvety, energizing Korean stew featuring Grand Marnier, pressure-cooked with low‑carb ingredients for a silky, savory bowl.
instructions: In a pressure cooker, heat the sesame oil over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and ginger, stir for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the chicken thighs, turning to coat with the aromatics.
Pour in the chicken broth, cherry tomatoes, and tamari.
Stir in the Grand Marnier and light cream, ensuring everything is evenly mixed.
Seal the pressure cooker and cook on high pressure for 10 minutes.
Quickly release the pressure, open the lid and stir the stew.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Let the stew sit for 2 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Serve hot, garnished with additional green onions if desired.
